title: Convenient Auger Shafts
description: An addon for Create Aeronautics that grants Auger Shaft the ability to deposit items into inventories at its end following their flow of direction & extract items from Swivel Bearings with connected Borehead Bearings!
body:
What is this mod?
=======
Have you always felt Auger Shafts could've been even greater?

This mod grants Auger Shaft the ability to deposit items into inventories at its end following their flow of direction & extract items from Swivel Bearings with connected Borehead Bearings!

_Technically it's only required server-side, but client-side grants the control to toggle the Auger Shaft new abilities._

_This is my first mod, so if you enconter any issue please let me know in [GitHub](https://github.com/DD-ROARO19/convenient_augershafts/issues) C:_

Credits:
============
* https://modrinth.com/mod/sable
* https://modrinth.com/mod/create-aeronautics
